TRANSLATION OF DOCUMENT 1438-PS
1938 REICHSGESETZBLATT, PART I, PAGE 1453
3rd. Order supplementary to the decree of the Fuehrer and Reich Chancellor concerning the administration of the Sudeten-German territory
Dated 22nd October 1938
The following order is issued by virtue of Section 9 of the decree of the Fuehrer and Reich Chancellor concerning the administration of the Sudeten-German territory, dated 1st. October 1938 (Reich Law Gazette, Page 1331):
Article 1
The Reichsfuehrer SS and Chief of the German Police in the Reich Ministry of the Interior can take the administrative measures necessary for the maintenance of security and order, even beyond the legal limits otherwise set on such measures.
Article 2
The Reichsfuehrer SS and Chief of German Police in the Reich Ministry of the Interior can delegate his powers to other departments.
Article 3
The order comes into force on the date of publication.
Berlin, 22nd. October 1938.
The Reich Minister of the Interior
Frick
Source:
Nazi Conspiracy and Aggression Volume IV
Office of the United States Chief Counsel for Prosecution of Axis Criminality
Washington, DC : United States Government Printing Office, 1946
